intended_audience: platform operators, data stewards, support engineers, and enterprise evaluators

panels.title: API Health And Latency
panels.source: FastAPI middleware, reverse proxy, or OpenTelemetry HTTP server spans
alert_thresholds: p95 latency above budget for 10 minutes
notes: Request IDs must be available for trace correlation.

panels.title: Workflow Throughput
panels.source: workflow repository, workflow steps, workflow events
alert_thresholds: review queue growth exceeds configured threshold
notes: Step metrics should separate parser, retrieval, validation, transform, and review gates.

panels.title: Assistant Streaming
panels.source: assistant stream replay artifacts, tool audit records, LLM adapter diagnostics
notes: External LLM cost and first-token latency must be separated from local tool execution telemetry.

panels.title: Retrieval Quality And Freshness
panels.source: retrieval evaluation reports, retrieval traces, source inventory
notes: Quality metrics should be trended by domain and source family.

panels.title: Background Jobs
notes: Queue-backed mode should add worker heartbeat and retry counters.

panels.title: Governance And Security
panels.source: auth repository, rate limiter, external provider policy, PHI policy, audit records
notes: Security alerts must avoid raw PHI in labels, logs, and dashboards.

panels.title: LLM And OCR Cost
panels.source: external provider policy, LLM/OCR/embedding adapters, abuse/cost policy
notes: Cost estimates are operational estimates, not billing-system truth.

missing_instrumentation: OpenTelemetry span export is not wired yet.
Production metrics backend and dashboard renderer are deployment-specific.
Sustained worker queue metrics require queue-backed job runner mode.
warnings: This catalog defines the dashboard contract and required signals; it does not create a hosted dashboard.
Dashboard labels must never include raw PHI.
